filtered_articles.title: The LEGO Marvel Dancing Groot Set Is Retiring Soon, but Amazon Has It on Sale for $36 Right Now
filtered_articles.description: The LEGO Marvel Dancing Groot set is on sale for $35.99 at Amazon, 20% off its list price of $44.99. It's set to be retiring soon, so now is a great time to grab it.

filtered_articles.title: Nintendo Switch Consoles Will No Longer Be Sold From Mid-February 2027 Onwards — at Least in Europe
filtered_articles.description: After almost a decade on sale, Nintendo will no longer sell its original Switch console — including Switch Lite and Switch OLED models — from mid-February 2027 onwards in Europe.
